LEGEND 35 sequence features are calculated, including 20 amino acid compositions
LEGEND All features are calculated over a sliding 21 amino acid window
LEGEND   KmR=KminusR DmE=DminusE KpR=KplusR PmN=K+R-D-E PpN=K+R+D+N aro=F+W+Y
LEGEND   fld = border of folded (pos) / unfolded (neg) Uversky et al Proteins 2000 41:415
LEGEND   dis = disorder propensity Rune & Linding NAR 2003 31:3701
LEGEND   bet = beta strand propensities Costantini et al 2006 BBRC 342:441
LEGEND   mem = Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy normalised (-1 to +1) JMB 157:105
LEGEND Only a subset of features used for prediction, according to best fit against data
LEGEND   underlying solubility data: cell-free expression Niwa et al PNAS 2009 106:4201
LEGEND Features used for prediction are scaled 0 - 1 over range in underlying dataset
